Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
import re

def normalize_srt\(srt_text\):
    text = srt_text.replace\('\\r\\n', '\\n'\).replace\('\\r', '\\n'\)
    entries = re.split\(r'\\n\\n+', text.strip\(\)\)
    normalized = []
    for entry in entries:
        lines = entry.strip\(\).split\('\\n'\)
        normalized.append\('\\r\\n'.join\(lines\)\)
    return '\\r\\n\\r\\n'.join\(normalized\) + '\\r\\n'

for name in ['EKZbdh6xia8_zh.srt', 'EKZbdh6xia8_bilingual.srt']:
    path = f'output/subtitle/{name}'
    content = open\(path, encoding='utf-8-sig'\).read\(\)
    normalized = normalize_srt\(content\)
    with open\(path, 'wb'\) as f:
        f.write\(b'\\xef\\xbb\\xbf' + normalized.encode\('utf-8'\)\)
    print\(f'Fixed {name}'\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
from src.subtitle import fetch_subtitle_snippets, merge_subtitle_fragments
_, snippets = fetch_subtitle_snippets\('https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EKZbdh6xia8'\)
merged = merge_subtitle_fragments\(snippets\)
print\(f'原始: {len\(snippets\)} → 合并: {len\(merged\)} \({len\(snippets\)/len\(merged\):.1f}x\)'\)
durations = [e.end - e.start for e in merged]
chars = [len\(e.text\) for e in merged]
print\(f'时长: {min\(durations\):.1f}s ~ {max\(durations\):.1f}s, 平均 {sum\(durations\)/len\(durations\):.1f}s'\)
print\(f'字符: {min\(chars\)} ~ {max\(chars\)}, 平均 {sum\(chars\)//len\(chars\)}'\)
print\(\)
for e in merged[:8]:
    print\(f'[{e.start:.1f}s - {e.end:.1f}s] \({e.end-e.start:.1f}s\) {e.text}'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1)

import yt_dlp

" 2>&1)
